title: The Repair Verdict
description: The crew splits up in Water Seven, exchanging treasure and discovering the city’s craftsmen, money, and hidden dangers.
scene: Across pages 13, 14, 15, 16, this part follows Luffy, Nami, Usopp, Zoro, Sanji. The crew splits up in Water Seven, exchanging treasure and discovering the city’s craftsmen, money, and hidden dangers.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: The gate will close in one minute.

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: That's how the aquatic elevator works!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: Hahaha! Water seven is so fun!!

dialogue.speaker: Kaku
dialogue.text: Where's Nico Robin? Is she on the ship!?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: Hm... no... she went out with chopper.

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: They went to buy some stuff.

dialogue.speaker: Chopper
dialogue.text: Fine. I'm going to go shopping, too.

dialogue.speaker: Kaku
dialogue.text: The best shipyard of the world!!

dialogue.speaker: Kaku
dialogue.text: There are lots of dry area here.

dialogue.speaker: Galley-La shipwright
dialogue.text: So big!! Everything is so big!!

dialogue.speaker: Kaku
dialogue.text: Are they looking at ships being made?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #9
dialogue.text: Let's go and see!! Go, yagara!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #10
dialogue.text: Look! Lue-chan is so strong!! So handsome!!

dialogue.speaker: Kaku
dialogue.text: Ehh? The ship mechanics beat the pirates?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #15
dialogue.text: Yeah. You must be a sailor. Yes?

summary: The crew splits up in Water Seven, exchanging treasure and discovering the city’s craftsmen, money, and hidden dangers.
